productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Printed Top
description: Composition Black round neck top made of 100% cotton, has graphic print and a bow detail on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Flaunt your feminine pride in style with this top from united colors of benetton.
